_comment: FICTIONAL TEST CLIENT — not a real business. Used only to prove the EP Website Factory end to end. Do not deploy.
description: Sample Home Services Co. is a fictional demonstration business used to test the EP Website Factory. It represents a typical local home-services company offering exterior cleaning and yard care to homeowners.

services.name: Pressure Washing
services.description: Exterior surface cleaning for driveways, siding, patios and walkways.

services.name: Window Cleaning
services.description: Interior and exterior window cleaning for homes and small businesses.

services.name: Lawn Care
services.description: Routine mowing, edging and seasonal yard cleanup.

services.name: Gutter Cleaning
services.description: Clearing and flushing gutters to keep water moving away from the home.

brand.styleNotes: Dark, premium, gold accents — EPSG default look.

seo.title: Sample Home Services Co. (DEMO) — Gulf Shores Home Services
seo.description: Fictional demo site built by the EP Website Factory: pressure washing, window cleaning, lawn care and gutter cleaning in Gulf Shores, AL.
